# Vectorial Data

> Stock picking service with daily researched picks across global equities. Every pick is cryptographically verified via SHA-256 hash chain on Base (Ethereum L2). $1/month, delivered via WhatsApp.
>
> Last updated: 2026-06-13

## Docs

- [Full Documentation](https://vectorialdata.com/llms-full.txt): Complete API reference, authentication, payment flows, and examples
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://vectorialdata.com/openapi.yaml): Machine-readable API specification
- [Developer Portal](https://vectorialdata.com/developers): Interactive API documentation and key registration
- [API Playground](https://vectorialdata.com/api-docs): Try every endpoint live in the browser (Scalar-powered, no signup required)

## API

- [Service Info](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/info): Service discovery, no auth needed
- [Stock Picks](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/picks): All picks with returns
- [Research](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/research/{ticker}): Full fundamental research per ticker
- [Portfolio](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/portfolio): Portfolio performance summary
- [Positions](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/portfolio/positions): All positions with live returns
- [Stocks](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/stocks): All researched stocks
- [Events](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/events): Portfolio events firehose (price moves, dividends, earnings, analyst calls, news). Each event carries `severity` (1-5), `affects_thesis` (bool), and one-line human summaries in es/en/pt/hi. Filter with `?severity_min=4` for thesis-changing only, or `?since=2026-05-01` for incremental sync. Humans on the site see only severity ≥ 4 by default; the API exposes the full firehose to AI agents.
- [Digest](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/digest/latest): Latest weekly digest (events + portfolio delta)
- [Economic Events](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/economic-events): Daily macro-event analysis (one most-relevant event per day) with localized es/en/pt/hi headline, what_it_means, market_impact and a learning takeaway, plus hard data (actual/forecast/previous/unit/surprise) and affected_markets. Use `?limit=N` (1-100).
- [Verify](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/verify/picks): Verifiable pick history (hash chain)

## x402 Pay-Per-Request

No API key needed. Pay USDC on Base per request. HTTP 402 flow.

- [x402 Info](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/info): Payment instructions and pricing
- [Picks](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/picks): All picks ($0.005)
- [Latest Pick](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/picks/latest): Most recent pick ($0.001)
- [Research](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/research/{ticker}): Full research ($0.01)
- [Portfolio](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/portfolio): Portfolio summary ($0.002)
- [Positions](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/portfolio/positions): All positions ($0.003)
- [History](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/portfolio/history): Historical performance ($0.005)
- [Sectors](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/sectors): Sector breakdown ($0.001)
- [Regions](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/regions): Region breakdown ($0.001)
- [Stocks](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/stocks): All stocks ($0.005)
- [Events](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/events): Portfolio events firehose with AI explanations ($0.002)
- [Digest](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/x402/digest/latest): Latest weekly digest ($0.003)

## Vectorial Signals (alt-data submarca)

Hedge-fund-tier alternative-data signals translated to plain language. Free preview per signal; full history + alerts on the $1/mo subscription. Every signal ships in 4 tiers — Casual (HTML), Pro (logged-in toggle), AI brief (markdown), Machine (JSON + JSON-LD).

- [Signals catalog](https://vectorialdata.com/signals): Index of all live signals
- [Signals JSON catalog](https://vectorialdata.com/api/signals): Machine-readable list with brief.md + machine-tier endpoints per signal
- [Signals OpenAPI 3.1](https://vectorialdata.com/api/signals/openapi.json): API spec
- [EIA Weekly Petroleum brief](https://vectorialdata.com/signals/eia-weekly-petroleum/brief.md): US crude inventories vs 5y average
- [Crack spread 3-2-1 brief](https://vectorialdata.com/signals/crack-spread-321/brief.md): Refining margin
- [LNG arbitrage brief](https://vectorialdata.com/signals/lng-arbitrage/brief.md): Henry Hub / TTF / JKM spreads
- [Hormuz Strait transits brief](https://vectorialdata.com/signals/hormuz-transit/brief.md): Daily AIS vessel transit count
- [TROPOMI NO₂ brief](https://vectorialdata.com/signals/tropomi-no2-economic/brief.md): Industrial activity from space
- [Iowa corn yield brief](https://vectorialdata.com/signals/iowa-corn-yield/brief.md): Satellite yield model vs USDA WASDE

## Vectorial Economía (daily macro events)

The single most relevant macro economic event of the day, explained in plain language so a human always leaves with a learning ("aprendizaje"), and structured so bots can download it. One event per day, no-op on empty days (anti-firehose). Descriptive educational information about macro data — not investment advice.

- [Economía (human)](https://vectorialdata.com/economia): Today's event + archive of earlier days
- [Public catalog JSON](https://vectorialdata.com/api/economic-events): Latest + recent events, machine-readable, no auth
- [Single event JSON](https://vectorialdata.com/api/economic-events/{slug}): One event with analysis + schema.org JSON-LD
- [JSON Feed](https://vectorialdata.com/economia/feed.json): JSON Feed 1.1 of recent events
- [RSS](https://vectorialdata.com/economia/feed.xml): RSS 2.0 of recent events
- [AI brief](https://vectorialdata.com/economia/{slug}/brief.md): Markdown brief per event
- [Gated API](https://vectorialdata.com/api/v1/economic-events): Full feed via API key or x402 (see API section)

## Content

- [Stock Research](https://vectorialdata.com/stocks): All researched stocks with returns, ratings, and sector analysis
- [Portfolio](https://vectorialdata.com/portfolio): Live portfolio tracking with transparent returns
- [Lessons](https://vectorialdata.com/lecciones): Top 5 worst-performing picks with honest retrospective analysis
- [Methodology](https://vectorialdata.com/metodologia): Return calculation method, loser selection, re-purchase handling
- [Verification](https://vectorialdata.com/verify): SHA-256 hash chain proof, blockchain-certified on Base L2
- [Share Portfolio](https://vectorialdata.com/share/portfolio): Shareable portfolio snapshot

- [Risk Disclosure](https://vectorialdata.com/risk-disclosure): General and specific investment risks
- [Legal Status](https://vectorialdata.com/legal-status): Publisher's Exclusion, Investment Advisers Act of 1940
